definition_en: Very High Frequency radio — the primary communication system at sea. Range: 20-60 nautical miles (line of sight). Required on commercial boats in Croatia.
definition_de: Ultrakurzwellen-Funk — das primäre Kommunikationssystem auf See. Reichweite: 20-60 Seemeilen (Sichtlinie).

definition_en: The international distress, safety, and calling channel (156.8 MHz). Must be monitored at all times when at sea. Used for MAYDAY, PAN-PAN, and SECURITE calls.
definition_de: Internationaler Not-, Sicherheits- und Anrufkanal (156,8 MHz). Muss auf See ständig abgehört werden.

definition_en: Digital system that automatically sends vessel identification (MMSI number) and position with distress alerts. Press the red distress button for 5 seconds to send automatic MAYDAY.
definition_de: Digitales System, das automatisch Schiffskennung (MMSI) und Position mit Notalarmen sendet.

definition_en: Maritime Mobile Service Identity — a unique 9-digit number assigned to each vessel's radio station. Like a phone number for your boat. Required for DSC operation.
definition_de: Maritime Mobile Service Identity — eine einzigartige 9-stellige Nummer für jede Schiffsfunkstelle. Wie eine Telefonnummer für das Boot.

content_en:
Key channels to know:
• Channel 16 (156.8 MHz) — Distress, safety, and calling
• Channel 70 — DSC digital distress and safety
• Channel 67 — Croatian coast guard working channel
• Channel 73 — Safety information broadcasts
• Channel 17 — Port operations (some Croatian ports)
• Channel 09 — Calling channel (alternative)
• Channel 06 — Ship-to-ship safety

Procedure for routine call:
1. Listen before transmitting
2. Call on Channel 16 (or designated channel)
3. State vessel name (3 times), 'this is' your name (3 times)
4. Switch to working channel for conversation
content_de:
Wichtige Kanäle:
• Kanal 16 (156,8 MHz) — Not, Sicherheit, Anruf
• Kanal 70 — DSC digitaler Not- und Sicherheitskanal
• Kanal 67 — Kroatische Küstenwache Arbeitskanal
• Kanal 73 — Sicherheitsinformationen
• Kanal 17 — Hafenbetrieb
• Kanal 09 — Alternativ-Anrufkanal
• Kanal 06 — Schiff-zu-Schiff Sicherheit

Routine-Anruf:
1. Vor dem Senden zuhören
2. Auf Kanal 16 anrufen
3. Schiffsname (3x), 'this is' eigener Name (3x)
4. Auf Arbeitskanal wechseln

content_en:
How to send a MAYDAY call:
1. Check radio is on Channel 16, full power
2. Press transmit button and say:
   'MAYDAY MAYDAY MAYDAY'
   'This is [vessel name] [vessel name] [vessel name]'
   'MAYDAY [vessel name]'
   'My position is [latitude/longitude or bearing/distance from landmark]'
   'I am [nature of distress: sinking, fire, etc.]'
   'I require [immediate assistance]'
   'Number of persons on board: [number]'
   'OVER'
3. Release button and wait for response
4. If no response, repeat after 1 minute

If you hear a MAYDAY: write down all details and stand by to assist.
content_de:
MAYDAY-Ruf senden:
1. Funk auf Kanal 16, volle Leistung
2. Sendetaste drücken:
   'MAYDAY MAYDAY MAYDAY'
   'This is [Schiffsname] (3x)'
   'MAYDAY [Schiffsname]'
   'My position is [Position]'
   'I am [Art der Not: sinking, fire, etc.]'
   'I require [immediate assistance]'
   'Number of persons on board: [Anzahl]'
   'OVER'
3. Taste loslassen, auf Antwort warten
4. Keine Antwort: nach 1 Minute wiederholen

MAYDAY gehört: Alle Details notieren, bereit zur Hilfe.

question_en: Which VHF channel must be monitored at all times when at sea?
question_de: Welcher UKW-Kanal muss auf See ständig abgehört werden?
explanation_en: Channel 16 (156.8 MHz) is the international distress, safety, and calling channel. It must be monitored at all times when at sea. Channel 70 is for DSC digital distress, Channel 6 for ship-to-ship safety.
explanation_de: Kanal 16 (156,8 MHz) ist der internationale Not-, Sicherheits- und Anrufkanal. Muss auf See ständig abgehört werden.

question_en: In a MAYDAY call, how many times do you say 'MAYDAY'?
question_de: Wie oft sagst du 'MAYDAY' bei einem Notruf?
explanation_en: MAYDAY is always spoken three times: 'MAYDAY MAYDAY MAYDAY'. This applies to all priority signals: MAYDAY (3x), PAN-PAN (3x), and SECURITE (3x).
explanation_de: MAYDAY wird immer dreimal gesprochen: 'MAYDAY MAYDAY MAYDAY'. Gilt für alle Vorrangsignale: MAYDAY (3x), PAN-PAN (3x), SECURITE (3x).

question_en: Your boat is sinking. Send a MAYDAY call. Your position is 43°30'N, 016°26'E. There are 4 persons on board.
question_de: Dein Boot sinkt. Sende einen MAYDAY-Ruf. Position: 43°30'N, 016°26'E. 4 Personen an Bord.
model_answer_en: MAYDAY MAYDAY MAYDAY. This is [vessel name] [vessel name] [vessel name]. MAYDAY [vessel name]. My position is 43 degrees 30 minutes North, 016 degrees 26 minutes East. I am sinking. I require immediate assistance. Number of persons on board: four. Over.
model_answer_de: MAYDAY MAYDAY MAYDAY. This is [Schiffsname] (3x). MAYDAY [Schiffsname]. My position is 43 degrees 30 minutes North, 016 degrees 26 minutes East. I am sinking. I require immediate assistance. Number of persons on board: four. Over.
